items.title: Celebrity appearances, controversial ads and other Super Bowl takeaways
items.description: Celebrities including Lady Gaga, Cardi B and Jessica Alba joined Bad Bunny's Super Bowl half time show.

items.title: Migrant boat capsizes off Libya leaving 53 dead
items.description: The IOM says that almost 500 people have been reported dead or missing off Libya so far this year.

items.title: Maxwell won't answer questions from Congress, lawyer says
items.description: Ghislaine Maxwell, the jailed associate of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, will invoke her Fifth Amendment right to avoid self-incrimination.

items.title: Fifteen killed in latest Lebanon building collapse, as warnings of neglect grow
items.description: Two blocks fall down in what is the fifth such disaster this winter, as warnings of neglect grow.

items.title: Epstein survivors call for full release of files in video
items.description: Millions of files relating to the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein have been released by the DOJ but many have redactions.
